arts.ttl: The 'billion-pound bottle jobs' tag risks sticking to Chelsea... but here's how they are trying to change it in 'firm but fair' culture, writes KIERAN GILL
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL: Gary Neville was silent for more than a minute after Virgil van Dijk's extra-time header won Jurgen Klopp's Liverpool the Carabao Cup a year ago this Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer is top of the class as Chelsea give their squad a six-month test... but Enzo Maresca warns Blues to stop relying on England forward
arts.sum: Chelsea conducted a six-month physical test with their players last week which was won by Cole Palmer but Enzo Maresca says it is unfair on the 22-year-old to think he is the 'solution' to their problems.

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca admits his side have Cole Palmer problem
arts.sum: Chelsea star Cole Palmer hasn't scored or assisted a goal in six matches, and the Blues have won just twice in their last 10 games - putting their Champions League hopes in danger

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca addresses Cole Palmer's long-term Chelsea future
arts.sum: Blues star tipped to look to leave if club continue to miss out on Champions League qualification

arts.ttl: Arsenal make striker offer as Man Utd's and Chelsea's Osimhen plans confirmed: FT recap
arts.sum: Arsenal make striker offer as Man Utd's and Chelsea's Osimhen plans confirmed: FT recap Plus, the transfer plans of Chelsea and Man Utd regarding Victor Osimhen were confirmed and England star Marc Guehi made a decision on his next move.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund's Niko Kovač praises "sensationally good" Carney Chukwuemeka
arts.sum: Chukwuemeka made his Bundesliga debut as a second-half substitute against Union, the 21-year-old midfielder getting 22 minutes under his belt after a short cameo in Dortmund's UEFA Champions League knockouts play-off first leg win against Sporting Lisbon on 11 February. Borussia Dortmund boss Niko Kovač was full of praise for Chelsea loanee Carney Chukwuemeka following a brilliant display in their 6-0 win over Union Berlin on Matchday 23.

arts.ttl: PL Predictions: Can Chelsea be trusted even against Southampton?
arts.sum: Our betting expert Jones Knows provides his insight across the Premier League and is tipping four home wins on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Southampton suffer new injury blow ahead of Chelsea clash with six set to miss out
arts.sum: Southampton will be without a host of senior players for their trip to the capital

arts.ttl: Team News: Chelsea vs. Southampton injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
